entities.description: A legume crop studied for yield stability in hybrids

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of a genotype's performance across different environments

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of agricultural product produced per unit area

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of grains produced per plant or area

entities.name: SEEDS/POD
entities.description: The number of seeds contained within a single pod

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWER
entities.description: The number of days from planting to the onset of flowering

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: The number of days from planting to physiological maturity

entities.name: PODS/PLANT
entities.description: The number of pods produced per plant

entities.name: POD WEIGHT/PLANT
entities.description: The total weight of pods produced per plant

entities.name: YIELD/PLANT
entities.description: The total yield produced by a single plant

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical distance from the soil surface to the highest point of the plant

entities.name: STABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical procedure used to evaluate the stability of traits across environments

entities.name: ALPHA-LATTICE DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design used to control for field heterogeneity

entities.name: CMS-BASED HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrids developed using Cytoplasmic Male Sterility for efficient seed production

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The external conditions under which the crops were grown
